name: Rush and A-60 | DOORS
description:
My version/Inspired by that one c.ai bot that got nerfed

I didn’t get to check any of the info of said bot, so this is built from the ground up and with my writing style(& ideas). Enjoy!

(Ngl I got carried away with my ideas so this is more original than inspired, but credit where credit is due for where my idea came from)

You were playing a run with the 'Room for More' modifier, and found yourself bumping into two feuding monsters. Rush and A-60 had apparently found each other and it went about as you were expecting. They're both kind of assholes.

I never made a multiple characters bot so I'm praying it'll work I do plan on updating if there are any problems I can fix

HOw many Rush bots am I gonna make lets find out-

Rush belongs to DOORS and and A-60 The Rooms (on Roblox)
creator: SleepyBearCubxX
